TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chishang (Ikekami go, 池上鄉) mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 79.23 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 12.44 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.05 km²), 7,640 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,901 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 2,162 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 28%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Chishang ays psgayun 8 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Kalokapuk , Muliyaw , Cikowa'ay , Dihekoay , Ciataw , Cipuwa , Fangafangasan , Kawaliwali , Cicala'ay . kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ (ikekami ɣo, ***) mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, kalokapuk , mulijaw , ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj , *iħekoaj , ʦ~ʨiataw , ʦ~ʨipuwa , *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan , kawaliwali , ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj . kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan
S.FORM: Chishang (Ikekami go, 池上鄉) mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 79.23 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 12.44 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.05 km²), 7,640 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,901 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 2,162 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 28%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Chishang ays psgayun 8 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Kalokapuk , Muliyaw , Cikowa'ay , Dihekoay , Ciataw , Cipuwa , Fangafangasan , Kawaliwali , Cicala'ay . kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ (ikekami ɣo, ***) mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, kalokapuk , mulijaw , ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj , *iħekoaj , ʦ~ʨiataw , ʦ~ʨipuwa , *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan , kawaliwali , ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj . kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan
